Hello, Universe!

A playground full of tiny delights. Scroll down and poke around.

🚀

Fast & Lightweight

Pure HTML, CSS & vanilla JS — zero dependencies, loads instantly.

🎨

Colorful

Gradient text, glassmorphism cards, and a live color mixer below.

⭐

Starry Night

An animated starfield lives behind everything — look carefully.

🎲

Interactive

Tap the counter, mix colors, or blast confetti — go wild.

HOW MANY TIMES CAN YOU CLICK?
